title: selliguea bisulcata
intro: Selliguea bisulcata, also known as the Bisected Polypody or Bisected Selliguea, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Selliguea bisulcata lie in its ability to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Selliguea bisulcata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
